productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Formal dressing only gets better with these black leather shoes from red tape. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look complement all formal and semi-casual wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Tapered toe for comfort and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised fit Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Leather tongue for easy wear Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather inner lining for breathable comfort Padded leather footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a wood textured forefoot for maximum grip on smooth surfaces Outsole stitched to the midsole for enhanced shoe durability Raised heel with horizontal grooves on the back heel for ergonomic comfort, grip and style
